sentences.arabic: يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُرَطِّبَ لِسَانَهُ بِذِكْرِ اللهِ تَعَالَى فِي كُلِّ حِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba da vlaži svoj jezik spominjanjem Uzvišenog Allaha u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should keep his tongue moist with the remembrance of Allah the Almighty at all times.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: «كَلِمَتَانِ خَفِيفَتَانِ عَلَى اللِّسَانِ، ثَقِيلَتَانِ فِي الْمِيزَانِ، حَبِيبَتَانِ إِلَى الرَّحْمَنِ: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيمِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الدَّعَوَاتِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: 'Dvije su riječi lahke na jeziku, teške na vagi, a drage Milostivom: Subhanallahi ve bi hamdihi, Subhanallahil-Azim' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o dovama].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Two words are light on the tongue, heavy on the scale, and beloved to the Most Merciful: Glory be to Allah and His praise, Glory be to Allah the Great' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Supplications].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الذِّكْرُ سَهْلٌ لِلْغَايَةِ وَلَكِنَّ أَجْرَهُ كَبِيرٌ جِدًّا عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj zikr je izuzetno lak, ali je njegova nagrada kod Allaha veoma velika.
sentences.translationEn: This remembrance is very easy, yet its reward is very great with Allah.

sentences.arabic: الْمُؤْمِنُ الذَّكِيُّ هُوَ الَّذِي يَسْتَغِلُّ وَقْتَهُ دَائِمًا فِي التَّسْبِيحِ وَالِاسْتِغْفَارِ.
sentences.translation: Pametan vjernik je onaj koji uvijek koristi svoje vrijeme za tesbih (slavljenje Allaha) i istigfar (traženje oprosta).
sentences.translationEn: The smart believer is the one who always utilizes his time in glorification and seeking forgiveness.
